author: doll-agent
content:
Added 5 non-symmetric eig correctness tests at the bottom of decomp/eigen.rs.

eig() previously had only the non-square error test; eigenvalue/eigenvector correctness on real non-symmetric inputs was untested.

Tests added:
- eig_upper_triangular_real_spectrum: spectrum == diagonal entries, verifies A*v_j == lambda_j*v_j
- eig_non_symmetric_3x3_real_spectrum: block-triangular with mixed real spectrum {1,4,6}
- eig_rotation_matrix_complex_spectrum: 90-deg rotation returns {+i,-i}, conjugate-pair check
- eigvals_complex_spectrum: eigvals path matches eig path
- eig_reconstruction_diagonalizable: V*Lambda*V^-1 == A for a 2x2 shear

Shared assert_eig_identity helper checks the spectral identity column-by-column at 1e-9 absolute tolerance.

decomp::eigen test count: 20 -> 25, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 3041af00.
